summary: Solid unit test suite covering all core functionality: version parsing, semantic versioning rules (patch/minor/major bumps), file updates, changelog generation, error handling, and output format. Well-organized with clear helpers and independent tests using temp directories. Coverage gaps: no tests for malformed JSON, Unicode characters, various commit scope syntaxes beyond basic patterns, extremely large version numbers, or edge cases like BREAKING CHANGE footer without type prefix. Rigor is good for happy paths and basic errors but limited for boundary conditions. Design is strong—clear test names, good fixture management, proper setup/teardown. Tests appear functional and aligned with implementation. Does not include GitHub Actions workflow integration tests that the task description requires (those would be in separate act-based test harness).
